2279470.name: Street Sense 2
2279470.description:
Welcome to Street Sense, an interactive game that teaches some of the skills you need to be a safer driver in real life.

In this game, you'll get to drive around on virtual roads and learn important things like how to spot dangerous situations on the road, how to turn safely, and how to share the road with others.

Street Sense is for new drivers who are just starting out and for experienced drivers who want to get better at driving. You'll experience different driving situations and learn how to deal with them, just like you would in real life.

When you're feeling confident, you can take a test to see how much you've learned in the Street Sense Road Test.

So, are you ready to become a great driver? Let's play Street Sense and learn how to drive safely!

Explore the newest enhancements to Street Sense, featuring the following updates:

- Introducing 17 new Hazard Perception Scenarios to test your skills.

- Enjoy a sleek New Enhanced UI for smoother navigation.

- Multi-Language Support (English, Farsi, Punjabi, & Simplified Chinese).

- Closed Captions available in all supported languages.

- Unlock scenarios efficiently with the new Tiered Scenario Unlocking System.

- Explore the Extended Rural Area in the "Practice" mode.

- Easily identify hazards from a distance with the new Auto Zoom on Hazard hover feature.
2279470.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
